Home.heroSubtitle: Minimalist, customizable, and smooth typing tests for professionals.
Home.heroLanguagesLine: Available in English, French, Spanish, German, and Portuguese — switch anytime from the header.
Home.authWarning: You need to login before you can take a test and earn certificate.
Home.whatIsP1: Typingverified is a free typing speed test and lesson platform designed to help you build real, measurable typing skills. Whether you're a beginner who wants to stop hunting and pecking, or a professional who needs to prove their WPM to an employer, Typingverified gives you the tools to practice, improve, and get certified.
Home.whatIsP2: Unlike basic online typing tests, Typingverified combines structured lessons, real-time feedback, and a verifiable certificate - all in a clean, distraction-free interface built for serious learners.
Home.howStep1Body: Warm up with unlimited free-form typing practice. No pressure, no timer - just you and the keyboard, building muscle memory at your own pace.
Home.howStep2Body: Work through 10 structured lessons, each with multiple tasks designed to progressively improve your speed and accuracy. Every task requires at least 90% accuracy and a minimum speed to pass.
Home.howStep3Body: Once you've completed all lessons and passed the final 60-second typing test (35 WPM / 95% accuracy), download your official Typingverified certificate - ready to attach to your resume or share with employers.
Home.who1: Job seekers who need to prove their typing speed during the hiring process
Home.who2: Students looking to build a professional skill before entering the workforce
Home.who3: Remote workers who want to boost productivity by typing faster and with fewer errors
Home.who4: Anyone who spends time at a keyboard and wants to get better at it
Home.why1Body: We calculate net WPM - subtracting errors from your gross speed - so your result reflects your real-world productivity, not just how fast you mash keys.
Home.why2Body: Watch your speed and accuracy update live as you type. Instant feedback helps you learn which habits to correct.
Home.why3Body: Our 10-lesson curriculum is built to take you from beginner habits to professional-grade speed, one step at a time.
Home.why4Body: Your Typingverified certificate includes your name, WPM, accuracy, and issue date. It's a clean, professional credential you can include in job applications.
Home.faqIntro: Common questions about typing speed, typing tests, and earning a typing certificate.
Home.faq1Q: What is a good WPM for a job?
Home.faq1A: Most office jobs expect at least 40 WPM. Data entry roles typically require 50 to 65 WPM, while transcription and medical roles need 70 to 85 WPM with 98% or higher accuracy. Take a free timed test to find out your current speed.
Home.faq2Q: How long does it take to improve typing speed?
Home.faq2A: Most people improve from 40 WPM to 60+ WPM within 4 to 6 weeks of 15 minutes of daily structured practice. Short daily sessions beat long occasional ones every time.
Home.faq3Q: Is a typing certificate worth it?
Home.faq3A: Yes — especially for roles where typing is a core skill. A verified certificate removes doubt for recruiters, can replace a live typing test in many remote job applications, and shows you take professional skill development seriously.
Home.faq4Q: Should I focus on speed or accuracy first?
Home.faq4A: Always accuracy first. Speed follows naturally once your muscle memory is solid. Practicing fast while making errors just reinforces bad habits and slows your long-term progress.
Home.faq5Q: Can I practice typing for free on Typingverified?
Home.faq5A: Yes. The practice page and all lessons are completely free. Create a free account to save your progress across sessions and work toward earning your typing certificate.
Home.faq6Q: How do I unlock the Typingverified certificate?
Home.faq6A: Complete all 10 lessons with at least 90% accuracy and a minimum Average WPM on every task. Then, while logged in, pass a 60-second test with at least 35 WPM net speed and 95% accuracy in a single run. Visit the Certificate page to generate and download your certificate.
Home.faq7Q: Is Typingverified available in other languages?
Home.faq7A: Yes. The site is available in English, French, Spanish, German, and Portuguese. Use the language menu in the header to change the interface.
Home.ctaBody: Practice typing for free, forever. No credit card, no trial period. Upgrade once to unlock all lessons and earn your official certificate.

Blog.metaDescription: Improve your typing speed with our latest articles, tips, and guides.
Blog.intro: Expert advice, tutorials, and insights to help you master the art of typing and boost your productivity.

About.metaDescription: Learn what Typingverified is, how our typing lessons and timed tests work, and how to unlock a verified typing certificate. Available in English, French, Spanish, German, and Portuguese.
About.heroIntro: Typingverified is a clean, focused typing app designed to help you build real typing speed and accuracy for modern work. You can practice freely, follow step-by-step lessons, and take timed tests to prove your skills.
About.languagesBody: The Typingverified interface is available in English, French, Spanish, German, and Portuguese. Use the language menu in the header to switch anytime.
About.bioP1: Typingverified was built by Louis, a developer and productivity tools creator focused on helping professionals build verifiable workplace skills.
About.bioP2: Having seen how many job applications are filtered out because of unverified typing speed claims, Typingverified was created to give every typist a clear, structured path from practice to professional certification — completely free to start.
About.trustP1: Typingverified content is based on practical typing training principles, measurable speed and accuracy benchmarks, and real hiring expectations for keyboard-based roles. The goal is simple: provide clear guidance that helps learners improve performance they can actually demonstrate.
About.trustP2: We prioritize clarity over hype, publish actionable lessons and articles, and keep the platform transparent about how progress and certification work. If you notice an issue, outdated advice, or unclear wording, reach out and we will review and improve it.
About.useIntro: You can move between practice, lessons, and tests depending on what you need:
About.useItem1: <label>Practice</label>: use the <practice>Practice</practice> page to warm up your fingers with unlimited, low‑pressure typing.
About.useItem2: <label>Lessons</label>: go to <lessons>Lessons</lessons> and work through each lesson task by task. Every task expects at least <acc>90% accuracy</acc> and an <avg>Average (31–50 WPM) or higher</avg> speed to count as passed.
About.useItem3: <label>Typing Test</label>: on the <test>Test</test> page you can run 60‑second or 120‑second timed tests and see your net WPM, accuracy, and errors in real time.
About.certIntro: Your certificate is meant to prove that you can type quickly and accurately in a real work setting. To unlock it, you need to:
About.certItem1: <label>Finish all lessons</label>: complete all <count>10 lessons</count>. Every task in every lesson must be passed with at least <acc>90% accuracy</acc> and an <avg>Average (31–50 WPM) or better</avg> score so the lesson is fully marked as completed.
About.certItem2: <label>Pass a strict 60‑second test</label>: while logged in, take a 60‑second test and reach at least <wpm>35 WPM net speed</wpm> and <acc>95% accuracy</acc> in the same run.
About.certItem3: Once both conditions are met, visit the <certificate>Certificate</certificate> page to generate and download your professional typing certificate.
About.progressBody: Progress, lesson results, and certificates are tied to your <account>logged‑in account</account>. You can practice as a guest, but guest sessions do not save results and cannot unlock a certificate. For the best experience, sign in, complete your lessons, and then take your final 60‑second test.

Privacy.metaDescription: Review how Typingverified collects and uses data, handles cookies, Google AdSense advertising, and your privacy rights and choices.
Privacy.intro: Welcome to Typingverified. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data. By using our website, you agree to the practices described here.
Privacy.s1Account: Account Information: When you register, we collect your name and email address.
Privacy.s1Usage: Usage Data: We collect lesson progress, WPM scores, accuracy rates, and test results.
Privacy.s1Cookies: Cookies and Tracking: We use cookies to operate the site, remember your session, and serve relevant advertising.
Privacy.s1Consent: We may use cookies and similar technologies for both site functionality and advertising personalization, subject to applicable consent requirements.
Privacy.s1Ads: Third-Party Advertising Cookies: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google and its partners may use cookies, including the DoubleClick cookie, to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites.
Privacy.s1OptOut: Opt out of personalized ads: <adsSettings>Google Ads Settings</adsSettings>
Privacy.s1GoogleData: How Google uses data: <googlePartner>Google's Privacy & Terms</googlePartner>
Privacy.s1bP1: The free tier of Typingverified may display advertisements served by Google AdSense.
Privacy.s1bP2: Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites.
Privacy.s1bP3: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting <adsSettings>Google Ads Settings</adsSettings>.
Privacy.s1bP4: We use cookies to remember your session, language preference, and progress.
Privacy.s1bP5: By using this site, you consent to the use of cookies as described above.
Privacy.s2Item2: Track your lesson and test progress
Privacy.s2Item3: Determine when you have earned a certificate
Privacy.s2Item4: Display relevant advertisements through Google AdSense
Privacy.s2Item5: Improve the platform and respond to support requests
Privacy.s3p1: We participate in Google AdSense, provided by Google LLC. Google AdSense uses cookies and web beacons to serve ads based on prior visits to our website and other websites.
Privacy.s3OptOut: Opt out of personalized ads via <adsSettings>Google Ads Settings</adsSettings>
Privacy.s4p1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data only with trusted service providers, when required by law, or in the event of a business transfer.
Privacy.s5Item1: Access, correct, or delete your data at any time
Privacy.s5Item2: Opt out of personalized ads via <adsSettings>Google Ads Settings</adsSettings>
Privacy.s6p1: Typingverified is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13.
Privacy.s7p1: We will update the Last updated date when this policy changes.
Privacy.s3OptOut2: You may also opt out of interest-based advertising from participating companies at <aboutads>aboutads.info</aboutads>.

Terms.metaDescription: Read Typingverified Terms of Service, including usage rules, certificates, ads, payments, and your responsibilities on the platform.
Terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully before using Typingverified ("the Service"). By accessing or using our website at <site>https://www.typingverified.com</site>, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
Terms.s1p1: By creating an account or using any part of Typingverified, you confirm that you are at least 13 years of age and agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
Terms.s2Item1: Free and premium typing practice lessons
Terms.s2Item3: A verifiable typing certificate upon completing all lessons and passing the final test
Terms.s2Item4: User accounts to save progress and results
Terms.s3Item1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
Terms.s3Item2: You agree to provide accurate information when creating your account.
Terms.s3Item3: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
Terms.s3Item4: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
Terms.s4Item1: Certificates are issued only to users who complete all 10 lessons (with at least 90% accuracy and minimum Average WPM per task) and pass the final 60-second test with at least 35 WPM net speed and 95% accuracy.
Terms.s4Item3: We reserve the right to revoke certificates if we determine they were obtained fraudulently.
Terms.s4Item4: Typingverified certificates are intended as personal skill validation tools and do not constitute professional or government-recognized qualifications.
Terms.s5Item1: Attempt to cheat, automate, or manipulate typing tests or lesson scoring
Terms.s5Item2: Use bots, scripts, or automated tools on the platform
Terms.s5Item3: Attempt to access other users' accounts or data
Terms.s5Item4: Upload or transmit malicious code or content
Terms.s5Item5: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
Terms.s5Item6: Resell or redistribute any part of the Service without our written permission
Terms.s6Item1: The Free plan provides permanent, no-cost access to unlimited practice, typing speed tests, and the first 2 lessons.
Terms.s6Item2: Paid Premium plans (when available) are subject to the pricing shown on our <pricing>Pricing page</pricing>.
Terms.s6Item3: All payments are processed securely. We do not store payment card details.
Terms.s6Item4: Fees paid are non-refundable except where required by applicable law.
Terms.s7p1: The free tier of Typingverified may display advertisements served by Google AdSense and potentially other third-party networks. By using the free tier, you consent to the display of such advertisements. Certified plan users enjoy an ad-free experience.
Terms.s8Item1: All content on Typingverified - including lessons, test prompts, UI design, branding, and certificate templates - is owned by Typingverified and protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws.
Terms.s8Item2: You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute our content without prior written permission.
Terms.s8Item3: Your typing results and certificate belong to you, and you may share them freely.
Terms.s9DisclaimerIntro: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee:
Terms.s9Item1: Uninterrupted or error-free availability of the Service
Terms.s9Item2: That your certificate will be accepted by any employer or institution
Terms.s9Item3: Specific results from using our lessons or tests
Terms.s10p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Typingverified shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use the Service.
Terms.s11p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without notice, if you violate these Terms or for any other reason at our discretion.
Terms.s12p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
Terms.s13p1: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes shall be resolved in the appropriate courts of the jurisdiction where Typingverified operates.
Terms.s14Intro: If you have questions about these Terms, please reach out:
